since_last: 11% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.39%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 11% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.95% · Gold -2.02% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 11% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.39%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.39%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.69%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.69%, DV +4.90%, BIDU +4.78%, PUBM +2.93%, ISRG +0.47%. Laggards: CGNX -6.15%, MU -5.07%, MRVL -4.85%, CEVA -4.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.35% at $149.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
